Kimbap Embedded Console

This embedded console route is enabled and served by the same Kimbap binary. It provides quick runtime visibility and links into operational workflows.

Checking runtime health…
  • Open health endpoint
  • Open actions API sample
Next steps
  • Use kimbap doctor to verify local runtime status.
  • Use kimbap actions list and kimbap call for core operations.
  • Use kimbap serve --console when you want this embedded shell route.
